development.//: Custom dev client for local work against the LAN API. Install once, then iterate with `npx expo start --dev-client`.

env.//: REPLACE with your Mac's LAN IP (debate-infra: `make lan-ip`). localhost only works on the iOS simulator — a physical phone needs the LAN IP.

preview.//: Shareable test build: Android APK you can send as a link/QR. No Play Console needed.

env.//: REPLACE with your deployed debate-api domain (see debate-api/DEPLOY.md).

production.//: Store builds: Android App Bundle + iOS archive for TestFlight/App Store.

env.//: REPLACE with your deployed debate-api domain. Must be https — App Store review rejects cleartext HTTP.

production.//: Filled in by `eas submit`; see BUILD_AND_SHIP.md for the values it asks for.
